details.IncidentDetail: "[28] Incident 260423OC0012 was reopened. Comment: Incident Reopened : RP CALLED IN --ADVSD VEH SHOULD HAVE NEVER BEEN DRIVER AND SHE THINKS IT WAS STOLEN BECAUSE SHE'S CONFUSED WHY IT WAS ON THE FREEWAY --- REQ SVR --17642 COLLIE LANE IN HUNTINGTON BEACH [Shared]"

"[12] 55-44 HAVE TRFC DIVERT OFF SB 605 TO SB 405 - ALL LNS WILL BE STOPPED [Shared]"
